name: Apple Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups peeled and thinly sliced apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Place apples in the pie shell.
2. Mix together sugar, flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon. Sprinkle this mixture over apples in the shell.
3. Melt the butter or margarine and stir into cream. Pour liquids over apples.
4. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 35 minutes. Makes 1 nine inch pie.
